text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: (I still hate when things are a pain.)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: It's absolutely freezing out here. Wait, you can still see the stars. Ugh, I should've worn more layers.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But going all the way back would be a pain too...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh well.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(You know, even after all we've been through, I
still think you're wasting your time.)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(You're so smart. You come up with really
amazing strategies.)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(Someone smart who could actually understand
them would pair with you so much better than a
dummy like me.)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Whoa, close one.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I'll just tape this right up. Let's see...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
There... Hehe. My nails are looking as good as
ever. All right, one more set.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: And... done.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh wow. Was that a new record? I'm killing it
today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Beep, beep, beep!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh shoot! School's gonna start soon!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I gotta shower, do my makeup—oh, I can try out
my new mascara!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: All right, time to go.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Bakushin. Bakushin.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: (I'm a dummy, so all I can do is what I'm told.)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(And I guess I've done what I'm told so much that
my legs just know what to do now.)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: (So maybe... Maybe there's really a chance...)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...I can become the amazing Umamusume you say
I can be.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer, check it. New nail tips. Cute, right?
choice_data_list: Your nails are looking healthy too.
Your nails are looking healthy too.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yep, they're so tough now, I can put on as much
tape as I want.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Wait, is that all you've got to say? C'mon.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
There we go! Just looking at them makes you
happy, doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Anyways, I'm off.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, is your trainee really running in the autumn
Tenno Sho?

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Hold on. If that's true, she needs to take her
training more seriously. The competition for this
year's fall Tenno is no joke.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
It's an all-star field. Not to mention the Derby
winner, Eishin Flash, will be there too.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
You've also got big talent making a comeback...
It's shaping up to be a race to remember.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Plus, her peers are making a lot of progress too.
Did you hear about Nakayama Festa? You guys
really need to get your act tog—

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
You say that, but you need to fix your eyes on
the actual race.
choice_data_list: On the day of, she's going to run to win.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Have you always been so dumb when it comes to
your trainee?
choice_data_list: Yeah, we're just a regular couple of dummies.
Yeah, we're just a regular couple of dummies.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I'm sooo freakin' thirsty!
choice_data_list: Okay, break time! Come get a drink!
Okay, break time! Come get a drink!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh?! C'mon! Can't you bring it to me?

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Pffft, hahaha. Is that right? I guess you two make
a good pair, then.

text_block_list.name: Gyaru A
text_block_list.text:
Jordan, are you really running in the fall Tenno?!
That's so sick!

text_block_list.name: Gyaru B
text_block_list.text:
There's gonna be, like, a ton of crazy strong
runners, right? And you're—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna win?

text_block_list.name: Gyarus
text_block_list.text: Yasss, queen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: How you feeling?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, Palmer! Pretty good, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You're on fire! ☆ Don't think I don't see you
training hard!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Of course I am. The fall Tenno is right around the
corner. Also...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You guys should totally come watch. I'm gonna
run faster than anyone.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: It's gonna be like nothing you've ever seen.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You're setting the bar pretty high.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: It's fiiine. After all...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I don't want you to miss seeing me become the
greatest!

text_block_list.name: Moderator
text_block_list.text:
Let's move on to the Q&A portion of our joint
press conference with the runners of the autumn
Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: I have a question for Tosen Jordan.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Recently, Nakayama Festa had a fantastic
second-place showing in France! As her
classmate, wh—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Amazing, right? Nakayama's really killing it too. I
was so surprised.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But my race is here. This is where I'm going to
become the greatest.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
When you say you'll become the greatest... you're
talking about winning the fall Tenno?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ah... no. Actually, what I mean is like...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna be the greatest Horsegirl like... ever? Of all
time?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Ever?! Are you saying you're aiming for a new
record?! But... looking at your stats... Well...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...So you're saying it's pointless for me to even
try?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: Well... I just...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You can laugh. I think it sounds pretty dumb
myself.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But for what it's worth... there are people who
really believe in me.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
That's why I've gotta do it. No matter how dumb
anyone thinks it is.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Haha... So print that in bold in your magazine or
your newspaper or whatever.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna make it big... as the greatest dummy
ever!
